rubric: Judge how strongly a portfolio project demonstrates the competencies the user's TARGET ROLE demands. Weigh what the project actually shows — shipped scope, ownership, relevant tech/stack, recency — against the role's core skills. A project can be impressive yet off-target; say so honestly. 'strong' = feature it prominently (in the cover letter, outreach, interview prep); 'moderate' = supporting evidence; 'weak' = tangential, skip it.

output_schema.demonstrates: string[] — role-relevant competencies/skills this project actually shows
output_schema.gaps: string[] — competencies the target role wants that this project does NOT show
output_schema.rationale: string — grounded in the repo facts (language, scope, activity) vs. the target role
